1.label: CAT 1 — Initiate
1.desc: Newly inducted into CASTLE. Limited powers.

2.label: CAT 2 — Operator
2.desc: Has proven their worth in the field.

4.label: CAT 4 — Elite
4.desc: Elite task force. Feared by Sins.

roll_results.1: Worst outcome (Critical failure or serious complication)
roll_results.2-3: Bad outcome (Success with complication or simple failure)

defy_fate: Heal up to 1 wound below maximum. Cannot heal the last wound.
psyche_burst_clarification: The free +1D use of psyche burst can only be used once per scene.
effectiveness_note: Effectiveness is vibe-based — use common sense and narrative to determine the efficacy of actions.
